meaning: n.<法>扎克雷起义(1358年法国北部农民暴动)
examples: There is no Jacquerie; society may rest assured on that point; blood will no longer rush to its head. But let society take heed to the manner in which it breathes.
The French tradition of rebellion reaches way back, past 1789 to the 1358 Jacquerie revolt, and beyond.
